name: Sodermanland County (Sweden)

colors.symbolism: the gold field of the Sodermanland arms

description: A square gold flag charged centrally with a black griffin rampant, armed and langued red.
history: The flag is the heraldic banner of the arms of Sodermanland County, derived from the medieval coat of arms of the historic province of Sodermanland.

features.symbolism: the gold field of the historic Sodermanland provincial arms
a black griffin rampant on a gold field, the historic emblem of the province of Sodermanland.
